title: Hstarian Alchemancy
description:
Hstar747s take on pvp and building
(A mod made for Basically Content SMP)
body:
This is Hstar747's mod that bases most crafting off of a rare tree that spawns around the world that allows you to craft things like
1. -Bronze
2. -Nickel
3. -Star Sap 
4. -Rapiers
5. -Sickles 
6. -A Rare Trophy
7. And more  
The main attraction is the Star Tree. The Star tree is a rare tree that spawns in almost every forest biome. Star wood trees are important for smelting Star Sap and Purified Star Sap for the main recipes.


This Mod includes both a combination of medieval weaponry, Magic and Modern day materials or compounds.

### Weapons:
The Sickle: The Sickle is a tool in the agricultural era used for harvesting crops. Now, the Sickle is a blood-lusting weapon. On right-click, the sickle will take a percentage of your HP and turn it into speed. The speed given is based on how low your health is.


The Rapier: Ah yes, a very agile piercing weapon. In this mod, the Rapier allows you to boost yourself in the air with a slight cooldown. My favorite part is the rapiers ability to clutch before you fall.

Totem of Repelling: Repels all potion effects and fire

Carbon Fiber Gauntlet: Crafted using 1 crystal trophy, 4 carbon fiber, 1 star sap, and 1 string. This weapon has huge knockback and has explosive end crystal properties. 

### Blocks:

Hstar747 Plushie: The Hstar Plushie is an adorable plushie that makes a sound on right click.

Nickel Nitrate Crystal Block: This block can be crafted with a bottle of Nickel Nitrate and Bonemeal. This block has falling properties and the same of those as amethyst.

Cobalt Block: A very strong and blastproof block that is blue

Star Table: Acts as a transmutation table for the items; Iron-Nickel , Copper-Bronze, Lapis Block- Cobalt Block, Sand- silicon.

### Other
There are other blocks and items that are in the mod.
This Mod will be updated in the future and will stay at 1.20.1.
Credit to [Dexflex_yt](https://modrinth.com/user/dexflex_yt) for the painting art and Abel and Dexflex_yt for some of the updated textures.

This mod requires the Fabric API.

The [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) mod is highly suggested to be used with this mod.


Experimental stuff: Minibots that walk arround and attack what attacks it.
